name: Use Cases: New use case guide (manual)

action.message:
Guide me through adding a new use case to use_cases/.

Please:
1. Ask me for the robot name (will become the filename, e.g. 'my_robot' → use_cases/my_robot.py)
2. Ask me for the API type: HTTP REST / MAVLink+DroneKit / ROS2 rosbridge /cmd_vel / TCP JSON / other
3. Ask me for the connection details (IP, port, credentials env var names)
4. Ask me for the physics: forward speed (m/s), turn type (in-place yaw / Ackermann / differential thrust / constrained), approximate turn rate
5. Ask me for the camera situation: no camera / always-on stream / needs activation
6. Generate the complete use_cases/{name}.py file using the minimal template from usecases-adding-new.md, filled in with my answers
7. Remind me to: add a .env entry, run validate_tools(), add a row to use_cases/README.md, test with --mock first

Start by asking for the robot name.
